evals.prompt: Plan robustness tests for a file import that updates persistent state: I/O errors, corrupted files, and crashes during import.
evals.expected_output: Fault injection plan, corrupt input plan, crash recovery plan, no-corruption/all-or-nothing/idempotency oracles, replay and regressionization path.
assertions: Includes Nth failure or partial operation

evals.expected_output: Identifies missing input format and contract details, proposes structured fuzz/corrupt-input plan without inventing exact behavior.

evals.prompt: Given this API spec, produce ordinary validation tests.
evals.expected_output: Should route to case design unless robustness-specific faults are requested.
